post.description: Trigger an immediate synchronization of Game Data from GitHub. Only admins can force a sync.

get.description: Check if a synchronization process is currently running. Only admins can check status.
Fetch a comprehensive summary of all progress types (quests, modules, skills, blueprints) for any user. Only admins can access this.
Fetch blueprint consumption states for any user. Only admins can access this.

put.description: Update blueprint consumption state for any user. Only admins can perform this.

get.description: Fetch hideout module levels for any user. Only admins can access this.

put.description: Update module level/unlock state for any user. Only admins can perform this.

get.description: Fetch quest completion states for any user by their ID. Only admins can access this.

put.description: Update the completion state of a quest for any user. Only admins can perform this.

get.description: Fetch skill node levels for any user. Only admins can access this.

put.description: Update skill node level/unlock state for any user. Only admins can perform this.

200.description: Successfully updated user skill node progress

404.description: User or Skill Node not found

Fetch an alert by its numeric ID

get.description: Basic check to see if the application process is running

post.description: Authenticate a user using an API key. Returns user details and the key as a token.

401.description: Invalid API key or user not found

get.description: Fetch API keys. Admins see all keys, regular users see only their own.

post.description: Generate a new API key for the current user. Only admins can create keys.
Deactivate an API key by its ID
Identify and remove duplicate hideout modules by their external_id. Keeps only the one with the lowest numeric ID. Only admins can perform this.

get.description: Fetch audit logs with various filters and pagination
Fetch all users with optional pagination. Only admins can list users.
Fetch detailed user data including associated API keys. Admins see anyone, users see only themselves.

put.description: Modify user profile details (email/username). Admins can update any user, regular users only their own username.

delete.description: Permanently delete a user and all their associated data. Only admins can delete users.

400.description: Invalid user ID or attempt to delete self

put.description: Enable or disable data access for a user. Only admins can update access.
Change a user's role to 'admin' or 'user'. Only admins can update roles.
